design_decisions: Created a specialized gap closure test suite to target edge cases in formatters, engine, and serialization.
Mocked DuckDB backend to test storage size retrieval logic.
Enhanced Report model tests to trigger hierarchical structure generation and sample rendering.
Refactored ReportEncoder to be more robust during JSON serialization and fixed a ZeroDivisionError in empty report scenarios.
results: Overall project test coverage increased from 84% to 95%. All core modules (formatters, structure, variables) are now at or near 100% coverage.
